mill-green.description: Core brand green for headings and dark surfaces.

husk-paper.description: Warm page surface inspired by rice husk and trade paper.

components.name: Primary quote button
components.description: Compact gold action with visible interaction states.

components.name: Quote field
components.description: Clearly labelled trade enquiry field with strong focus and error states.

components.name: Product ledger
components.description: Image-led numbered rice entry with restrained borders and no resting shadow.

narrative.overview: A sturdy, specific trade website where rice varieties and a complete quote brief do the work.

rules.name: The Trade Voice Rule
rules.body: Write as an experienced mill representative. Use concrete buyer details and direct sentences.

rules.name: The Product First Rule
rules.body: Numbered rice and its buying context appear before decorative brand material.

rules.name: The Flat Ledger Rule
rules.body: Use rules and spacing for structure. Reserve shadows for state and necessary elevation.
